summary: Recent updates to the libwebrtc integration in Firefox focus on improving video performance and reporting. By parsing VP8 and VP9 quantization parameters, the platform decoder can now accurately track video quality through the qpSum statistic, which provides insights into compression efficiency. Additionally, the transition from the deprecated OnDroppedFrame method to the more current OnFrameDropped helps ensure that the browser handles frame drops more effectively during video calls, enhancing the overall user experience. **This means users will likely notice improved video quality and smoother playback during WebRTC sessions**.
